mapper.sql: bu.id, bu.created_time, bu.created_timestamp, bu.created_by, bu.created_id, bu.modified_time, bu.modified_timestamp, bu.modified_by, bu.modified_id, bu.deleted, bu.version, bu.remark, bu.enabled, bu.locked, bu.job_number, bu.username, bu.mobile, bu.real_name, bu.mail, bu.admin_flag, bu.ga_bind_flag
bu.id as userId, bu.job_number, bu.username, bu.mobile, bu.real_name, bu.sex, bu.mail, bu.nick_name, bu.id_card, bu.avatar, bu.admin_flag, bu.ga_bind_flag

bu.id as userId, bu.enabled, bu.locked, bu.account_expired, bu.credentials_expired, bu.job_number, bu.username, bu.password, bu.mobile, bu.real_name, bu.sex, bu.mail, bu.nick_name, bu.id_card, bu.avatar, bu.admin_flag, bu.ga_bind_flag

select bu.id as userId, bu.real_name as userRealName, bo.id as orgId, bo.code as orgCode, bo.name as orgName, bo.abbr as orgAbbr from `user` bu inner join user_role bur on bu.id = bur.user_id and bur.deleted = 0 inner join role br on bur.role_id = br.id and br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 and br.id in
order by bu.username asc

select bu.id as userId, bu.real_name as userRealName, bo.id as orgId, bo.code as orgCode, bo.name as orgName, bo.abbr as orgAbbr from `user` bu inner join user_group_user bugu on bu.id = bugu.user_id and bugu.deleted = 0 inner join user_group bug on bugu.user_group_id = bug.id and bug.deleted = 0 and bug.status = 1 inner join user_group_role bugr on bug.id = bugr.user_group_id and bugr.deleted = 0 inner join role br on bugr.role_id = br.id and br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 and br.id in
order by bu.username asc
mapper.select: select bu.id as userId, bu.real_name as userRealName, bd.id as departmentId, bd.code as departmentCode, bd.name as departmentName, bo.id as orgId, bo.code as orgCode, bo.name as orgName, bo.abbr as orgAbbr from `user` bu inner join user_department bud on bu.id = bud.user_id and bud.deleted = 0 inner join `department` bd on bud.department_id = bd.id and bd.deleted = 0 and bd.status = 1 inner join `org` bo on bd.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 and bd.id in

select
,
from `user` bu inner join user_org buo on bu.id = buo.user_id and buo.deleted = 0 and buo.checked = 1 inner join `org` bo on buo.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where bu.deleted = 0 and (bu.username = #{param} or bu.mobile = #{param} or bu.mail = #{param} or bu.id_card = #{param})
